title: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-5 / CA 12-3 on Policy Statement on Rental of Residential Other Real Estate Owned (OREO) Properties -- April 5, 2012 -- Revised June 25, 2018
title_normalized: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-5 / CA 12-3 on Policy Statement on Rental of Residential Other Real Estate Owned (OREO) Properties -- April 5, 2012 -- Revised June 25, 2018
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-5
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  While this guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve, the statement is particularly relevant to large banking organizations with significant portfolios of residential OREO properties.
section_headings: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
